tools_used: CourtListener MCP opinion search and endpoint lookup
helpful: The provisioned petition included the full lower-court memorandum and current docket signals.
CourtListener MCP made the March 2026 Zorn opinion available as close legal context.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, circuit, relist, and CVSG calibration cuts.
gaps: The local corpus query service became unreachable after one successful lookup.
A historical base-rate cut for requested responses would materially improve calibration.
The prompt references salience-band tables that were not present in the committed statpack.
notes: MCP legal research remained available when later corpus-prior lookups timed out. No brief in opposition was provisioned because the requested response was not yet due.
